createdDate.description: The timestamp when the API was created.

version.description: A version identifier for the API.

warnings.description: The warning messages reported when failonwarnings is on.

binaryMediaTypes.description: The list of binary media types supported by the REST API.

minimumCompressionSize.description: A nullable integer for the minimum payload size in bytes to compress.

apiKeySource.description: The source of the API key for metering requests.

policy.description: A stringified JSON policy document that applies to this REST API.

tags.description: Tags attached to the REST API.

disableExecuteApiEndpoint.description: Specifies whether clients can invoke your API by using the default execute-api endpoint.
